data.body: Landed via Gerrit change 823 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/823), submitted as commit 5f2d31a55 on origin/main with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 (0 unresolved comments). The three specs now each carry a balanced gold_set (finding+pass entries): plan-review-asserted-capability (6 entries), plan-review-decomp-shape (4), plan-review-necessity (4). Local strict validation: validate_eval_spec(spec, strict=True) returns no errors for all 21 dataset-bearing packaged specs. Prompt Eval action run 29678395138 for commit 5f2d31a55 concluded success (offline eval-discipline green).
